reasoning: The baseline FIDE Elo rating for Gukesh D around 2025-10-26 is 2794. A 1% increase requires reaching an Elo of at least 2821.94. Gaining ~28 Elo points at the elite 2800 level is extraordinarily difficult and historically rare, usually requiring prolonged, flawless dominance in top-tier events. Furthermore, new FIDE rules implemented on October 1, 2025, penalize top players more heavily for draws or losses against lower-rated opponents, making massive rating climbs for 2790+ players even more challenging. The Nov 2 and Nov 25 dates will almost certainly reflect identical or near-identical rating lists to the baseline October list. While the Jan 24 date gives roughly three months of potential play, a 28-point leap remains highly improbable over such a short timespan.
batch_queries: According to Wikipedia, will Gukesh D have an Elo rating on each resolution date listed below that's at least 1% higher than on 2025-10-26?
